name: teamLab Borderless Digital Art Museum
description: Immersive digital art installation spread across multiple rooms. Stunning light and projection art.

name: Tsukiji Outer Market Food Tour
description: Street food tour through Tokyo's famous outer fish market. Fresh sushi, tamagoyaki, and more.

name: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
description: Beautiful national garden blending Japanese, French, and English landscape styles.

name: Senso-ji Temple & Asakusa Walk
description: Tokyo's oldest temple with traditional shopping street (Nakamise). Best visited at dawn.

name: Shibuya Crossing & Harajuku Street Fashion
description: Experience the world's busiest pedestrian crossing, then explore youth fashion in Harajuku.

name: Meiji Jingu Shrine Walk
description: Forested Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji. Peaceful walking path through cedars.

name: Louvre Museum
description: World's largest art museum housing the Mona Lisa, Venus de Milo, and 35,000+ works.

name: Seine River Cruise (Bateaux Mouches)
description: 1-hour boat tour past Notre Dame, Eiffel Tower, and Musée d'Orsay. Evening tours especially romantic.

name: Montmartre & Sacré-Cœur Walk
description: Winding cobblestone streets, artists' quarter, and panoramic city views from the hilltop basilica.

name: Le Marais Food & History Tour
description: Guided walking tour of the historic Marais district with stops at Jewish bakeries, fromageries, and galleries.

name: Versailles Palace Day Trip
description: The Sun King's legendary palace and gardens, 40 minutes from Paris by RER train.

name: The Metropolitan Museum of Art
description: One of the largest art museums in the world. Egyptian Wing, Greek galleries, Impressionists.

name: Brooklyn Bridge Walk & DUMBO
description: Walk the iconic bridge for skyline views, then explore the artsy DUMBO neighbourhood.

name: Central Park Highlights Tour
description: Self-guided or guided tour of the park's iconic spots: Bethesda Fountain, Strawberry Fields, the Ramble.

name: Chelsea Market & High Line
description: Gourmet food hall inside a historic biscuit factory, connected to the High Line elevated park.

name: Broadway Show
description: World-class theatre in the heart of Manhattan. Check TKTS booth for same-day discounted tickets.

name: Ubud Sacred Monkey Forest
description: Ancient Hindu temples surrounded by tropical forest and 700+ long-tailed macaques.

name: Tegallalang Rice Terrace Sunrise Walk
description: Iconic UNESCO-listed rice terraces near Ubud. Best at sunrise before the crowds arrive.

name: Tanah Lot Sunset Temple
description: Ancient sea temple on a rocky outcrop, one of Bali's most photographed sunset spots.

name: Seminyak Beach & Surf Lesson
description: World-class breaks at Seminyak and Kuta. Beginner surf schools available year-round.

name: Balinese Cooking Class
description: Morning market visit followed by hands-on class making satay, lawar, and black rice pudding.

name: British Museum
description: Free entry to one of the world's greatest collections: Rosetta Stone, Elgin Marbles, Egyptian mummies.

name: Tower of London & Tower Bridge
description: 900 years of royal history, the Crown Jewels, and a walk across the iconic bascule bridge.

name: Borough Market
description: London's oldest and most renowned food market, open Thursday–Saturday. Artisan cheese, street food.

name: Hyde Park & Kensington Gardens
description: Royal parks perfect for picnics, rowing on the Serpentine, and visiting the Diana Memorial.

name: West End Musical
description: World-class musicals in the heart of London's theatre district. Book ahead or try day seats.

name: Sydney Opera House Guided Tour
description: Behind-the-scenes tour of the iconic UNESCO-listed concert hall. Show tickets available separately.

name: Bondi to Coogee Coastal Walk
description: 6km clifftop walk with stunning ocean views, rock pools, and secluded beaches.

name: Blue Mountains Day Trip
description: 2-hour drive west. Three Sisters rock formation, Jenolan Caves, and eucalyptus-scented valleys.

name: Sydney Harbour Ferry & Manly Beach
description: Scenic 30-min Manly Ferry from Circular Quay, with harbour views and a surf beach at the end.

name: Sagrada Família
description: Gaudí's extraordinary basilica, still under construction since 1882. Book tickets weeks ahead.

name: La Boqueria Market & Tapas Crawl
description: Famous covered market on La Rambla, followed by a tapas bar crawl in the Gothic Quarter.

name: Park Güell & Gràcia District
description: Gaudí's mosaic-tiled park with panoramic city views, then explore the bohemian Gràcia neighbourhood.

name: Barceloneta Beach & Seafood Lunch
description: City beach with buzzing promenade. Lunch at a chiringuito for fresh paella or grilled seafood.

name: Colosseum & Roman Forum
description: The world's largest ancient amphitheatre plus the political heart of the Roman Empire.

name: Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel
description: Michelangelo's ceiling, Raphael Rooms, and 2,000 years of papal art. Book in advance.

name: Trastevere Neighbourhood & Street Food
description: Rome's most charming neighbourhood with ivy-covered piazzas, trattorias, and gelato shops.

name: Pantheon & Piazza Navona Walk
description: Visit the world's best-preserved Roman temple (free entry), then explore the baroque Piazza Navona.

name: Rijksmuseum
description: The national museum of the Netherlands. Rembrandt's Night Watch, Vermeer, and 800 years of Dutch history.

name: Anne Frank House
description: The hidden annex where Anne Frank wrote her famous diary. Deeply moving. Book tickets in advance.

name: Canal Boat Tour
description: 90-minute narrated boat tour through Amsterdam's UNESCO World Heritage canal ring. Day or evening options.

name: Jordaan Neighbourhood Walk
description: Explore the charming canal houses, galleries, and cafés of the Jordaan. Best done without a map.

name: Van Gogh Museum
description: The world's largest collection of Van Gogh's work. Over 200 paintings and 500 drawings. Book ahead.

name: Burj Khalifa 'At the Top'
description: Observation deck on floors 124/125 of the world's tallest building. Stunning cityscape and desert views.

name: Dubai Food Tour — Al Fahidi District
description: Explore the historic old town with a local guide. Taste Emirati dishes, Arabic coffee, and street food.

name: Desert Safari with BBQ Dinner
description: Dune bashing, camel riding, sand boarding, and a traditional Bedouin camp BBQ dinner under the stars.

name: Dubai Marina Dhow Cruise
description: Traditional wooden dhow dinner cruise along the glittering Dubai Marina skyline. Live entertainment included.

name: Gold Souk & Spice Souk
description: Wander through 380 gold shops of the Deira Gold Souk, then haggle for spices in the historic Spice Souk.

name: Gardens by the Bay — Supertrees
description: Iconic Supertree Grove light show (OCBC Skyway). Evening light show is free from the ground.

name: Hawker Centre Crawl (Maxwell or Lau Pa Sat)
description: Eat where locals eat. Chicken rice, char kway teow, laksa, and satay for under $10 SGD per dish.

name: Sentosa Island Day
description: Cable car to Sentosa, Universal Studios Singapore, Palawan Beach, and S.E.A. Aquarium in one island day.

name: Little India & Kampong Glam Walk
description: Explore Singapore's vibrant Indian and Malay cultural quarters. Colourful temples, textiles, and street art.

name: Museo Nacional del Prado
description: One of the world's greatest art museums. Velázquez, Goya, El Greco. Free entry Tuesday–Saturday 6–8PM.

name: El Rastro Sunday Flea Market
description: Vast open-air market in La Latina — antiques, vinyl, clothing, food stalls. Go before noon, bring cash.

name: Tapas Tour in La Latina
description: Bar crawl through La Latina's medieval streets. Patatas bravas, jamón ibérico, croquetas, and vermouth.

name: Royal Palace & Plaza Mayor Walk
description: Tour the Palacio Real (Europe's largest royal palace by floor area), then explore the pedestrian plaza.

name: Grand Palace & Wat Phra Kaew
description: Thailand's most sacred temple complex. The Emerald Buddha is a must-see. Dress modestly — shoulders covered.

name: Floating Market Tour — Damnoen Saduak
description: Classic canal market tour by longtail boat. Vendors in wooden boats selling tropical fruits, food, crafts.

name: Street Food Night Walk — Yaowarat (Chinatown)
description: Bangkok's Chinatown at night. Pad Thai, mango sticky rice, crab, roasted duck, and freshly pressed juice.

name: Thai Cooking Class
description: Morning market tour followed by hands-on cooking class. Learn 4 classic dishes. All skill levels welcome.
